name: Creamy Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and milk in a saucepan.
2. Cook over heat until it reaches the soft ball stage.
3. Remove from heat and add the remaining ingredients.
4. Mix well.
5. Pour into a buttered baking dish measuring 8x8x2 inches.
6. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
